title: Senior Plant Manager at Netafim India

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Netafim India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Netafim India in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Netafim India:
Netafim India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netafim India!
